{{CargoRelic
|name=? Block
|class_id=20991
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A suspiciously block with a question mark. One glance at it and your skull starts itching for a headbutt. When that sweet "ding!" hits your ears, you’ll suddenly crave denim overalls.
|fame=31
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=19
|tech=13
|ss1=Earth RES +4<br>Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +16<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss2=Earth RES +8<br>Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +32<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss3=Earth RES +12<br>Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +48<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss4=Earth RES +12<br>Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +48<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000
|ss7=Earth RES +12<br>Per 200 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +48<br>Fissure Floor: 5000/5000<br> (Awakened)
}}
